mapper.sql: id, canonical_symbol, data_source, interval_type, adjust_type, last_success_time, last_trade_date, last_bar_time, total_rows, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_data_watermark (canonical_symbol, data_source, interval_type, adjust_type, last_success_time, last_trade_date, last_bar_time, total_rows) VALUES (#{canonicalSymbol}, #{dataSource}, #{intervalType}, #{adjustType}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{lastTradeDate}, #{lastBarTime}, #{totalRows})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM market_data_watermark
ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
